name: SWFT Method
cardDescription: Turn Instagram followers into customers with a custom website built in 7 days — pay once or stay on a monthly plan with updates included.
description: The SWFT Method is a guided build plan for creators and service brands coming from social — custom site in 7 days, optional feature add-ons, Stripe checkout.

whoItsFor.intro: The SWFT Method is for creators, coaches, and small brands who've outgrown link-in-bio tools and want a real website fast — without learning Webflow yourself.
idealFor: Instagram-first businesses ready to capture leads on a owned site
Service providers who need booking, checkout, or store add-ons
Owners who want a 7-day build with a clear quote before paying
Brands choosing between pay-once ownership or monthly updates
notIdealFor: Large e-commerce catalogs (see E-Commerce tier on website pricing)
Enterprises needing 20+ pages and complex integrations
Teams that only need monthly content with no website build

steps.name: Build plan form
steps.description: Answer guided questions about your business, features, and timeline on swft-method.html.

steps.name: Quote + plan choice
steps.description: See your custom feature list and choose One-Time Build or Monthly Plan.

steps.name: 7-day build
steps.description: SWFT designs and builds your site with one revision round included.

steps.name: Launch + bio-link setup
steps.description: Site goes live with Instagram bio and key links wired up.

steps.name: Ongoing (optional)
steps.description: Monthly Plan includes updates and check-ins; One-Time can add $99/mo maintenance.

caseStudies.headline: Creator website in days
caseStudies.whyMatch: Fitness creator moved from social-only to an owned platform with courses and booking paths.

caseStudies.headline: Service brand clarity
caseStudies.whyMatch: Professional Webflow presence for a B2B digital services company.

plans.name: One-Time Build
plans.sub: Pay once, own your site outright.
includes: Everything selected in your build plan

addon.name: Monthly maintenance
addon.description: Updates, small changes, and upkeep so your site stays current.

plans.name: Monthly Plan
plans.sub: Lower upfront. We build, maintain, and grow it with you.
includes: Everything selected in your build plan
Updates included — ongoing tweaks and changes
